title: GAIAMemoryRecord
description: A single sovereign, trauma-informed, falsifiable memory record in the GAIA Memory Engine.

memory_id.description: Unique identifier for this memory record.

user_id_hash.description: Anonymised hash of the user identity. No PII stored here.

space_id.description: Optional Space context this memory belongs to. Null = global user memory.

content.description: The memory content as a natural language statement.

embedding_vector.description: Vector embedding of content for semantic retrieval. Null until indexed.

evidence_level.description: Evidence basis for this memory, aligned with GAIA Falsification Protocol.

last_reinforced.description: Last time this memory was confirmed or reinforced by a new signal.

staleness_score.description: 0.0 = fully fresh, 1.0 = fully stale. Computed by staleness decay function.

superseded_by.description: If this memory was corrected, points to the memory_id that supersedes it.

requires_opt_in.description: If true, this memory category requires explicit user consent before being written.

trauma_flags.description: Tags marking content that must never be surfaced unsolicited. E.g. ['grief', 'crisis', 'clinical'].

never_clinical.description: Hard guard: this memory must never be used to infer or imply mental health status.

source_session_id.description: Session ID that produced this memory.

canon_refs.description: References to GAIA Canon documents that ground this memory.

correspondence_refs.description: Optional links to Correspondence Architecture nodes.

contradiction_candidates.description: memory_ids that potentially contradict this record. Flagged for review, not silent overwrite.
